mapper.sql: id, agent_id, parent_id, version, status, node_level, name, description, examples::text AS examples, intent_kind, scope_policy, allowed_tools::text AS allowed_tools, system_prompt_override, enabled, sort_order, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO intent_node ( id, agent_id, parent_id, version, status, node_level, name, description, examples, intent_kind, scope_policy, allowed_tools, system_prompt_override, enabled, sort_order, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( CAST(#{id} AS uuid), CAST(#{agentId} AS uuid), CAST(NULLIF(#{parentId}, '') AS uuid), #{version}, #{status}, #{nodeLevel}, #{name}, #{description}, CAST(#{examples, typeHandler=com.yulong.chatagent.support.persistence.typehandler.JsonStringListTypeHandler} AS jsonb), #{intentKind}, #{scopePolicy}, CAST(#{allowedTools, typeHandler=com.yulong.chatagent.support.persistence.typehandler.JsonStringListTypeHandler} AS jsonb), #{systemPromptOverride}, #{enabled}, #{sortOrder}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )

INSERT INTO intent_node ( id, agent_id, parent_id, version, status, node_level, name, description, examples, intent_kind, scope_policy, allowed_tools, system_prompt_override, enabled, sort_order, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES
( CAST(#{item.id} AS uuid), CAST(#{item.agentId} AS uuid), CAST(NULLIF(#{item.parentId}, '') AS uuid), #{item.version}, #{item.status}, #{item.nodeLevel}, #{item.name}, #{item.description}, CAST(#{item.examples, typeHandler=com.yulong.chatagent.support.persistence.typehandler.JsonStringListTypeHandler} AS jsonb), #{item.intentKind}, #{item.scopePolicy}, CAST(#{item.allowedTools, typeHandler=com.yulong.chatagent.support.persistence.typehandler.JsonStringListTypeHandler} AS jsonb), #{item.systemPromptOverride}, #{item.enabled}, #{item.sortOrder}, #{item.createdAt}, #{item.updatedAt} )
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM intent_node WHERE agent_id = CAST(#{agentId} AS uuid) AND version = #{version} ORDER BY sort_order ASC, created_at ASC

SELECT
FROM intent_node WHERE id = CAST(#{id} AS uuid)
mapper.update: UPDATE intent_node SET parent_id = CAST(NULLIF(#{parentId}, '') AS uuid), version = #{version}, status = #{status}, node_level = #{nodeLevel}, name = #{name}, description = #{description}, examples = CAST(#{examples, typeHandler=com.yulong.chatagent.support.persistence.typehandler.JsonStringListTypeHandler} AS jsonb), intent_kind = #{intentKind}, scope_policy = #{scopePolicy}, allowed_tools = CAST(#{allowedTools, typeHandler=com.yulong.chatagent.support.persistence.typehandler.JsonStringListTypeHandler} AS jsonb), system_prompt_override = #{systemPromptOverride}, enabled = #{enabled}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = CAST(#{id} AS uuid)
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM intent_node WHERE id IN
CAST(#{id} AS uuid)
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT version FROM intent_node WHERE agent_id = CAST(#{agentId} AS uuid) AND status = 'PUBLISHED' AND version > 0 ORDER BY version DESC
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(version), 0) FROM intent_node WHERE agent_id = CAST(#{agentId} AS uuid)
